creator: Alexander Terp
description:
Add comprehensive test coverage for the radls language server binary.

This includes:
- Basic startup/shutdown tests
- A test mirroring the homebrew-core formula test (assert 'Spinning up Rad LSP server' on stderr, exit 1). Keep this in sync with Formula/r/rad.rb in homebrew-core.
- LSP protocol tests (initialize, textDocument/didOpen, etc.)
- Error handling and edge cases

See also: the Homebrew_FormulaTestScript snapshot test in core/testing/snapshots/misc/homebrew.snap which covers the rad script side of the homebrew formula.
title: Add thorough radls (LSP) test coverage
